smsTemplates.rem2En:
Dear {Mgeni},

This is a respectful reminder to complete your pending outstanding contribution balance to support our event "{Tukio}".

Balance Due: TZS {Balance}

Thank you sincerely for your generosity.
smsTemplates.rem2Sw:
Ndugu {Mgeni},

Tunakukumbusha kwa heshima kabisa kukamilisha ahadi yako ya mchango kwa ajili ya kufanikisha tukio la {Tukio}.

Salio linalobaki: TZS {Balance}

Asante sana kwa ukarimu wako.
smsTemplates.pledge1En:
Hello {name},

The family of {host_name} warmly invites you to support our upcoming {event_name} scheduled for {date}.

Your contribution is deeply appreciated and will play a vital role in making this celebration a success. We kindly request you to submit your pledge or contribution by {tarehe_ya_mwisho}.

Contribution Details:
{namba_za_malipo}

Thank you for your love and support!
smsTemplates.pledge1Sw:
Habari {name},

Familia ya {host_name} inakusalimu kwa unyenyekevu. Tunakuomba ushirikiane nasi kwa mchango wako wa upendo ili kufanikisha tukio letu la {event_name} litakalofanyika tarehe {date}.

Mchango wako ni wa thamani kubwa kwetu na utasaidia sana katika maandalizi ya jambo hili. Tunaomba uwasilishe mchango wako kabla ya tarehe {tarehe_ya_mwisho}.

Namba za Michango:
{namba_za_malipo}

Ahsante sana kwa upendo wako na Mungu akubariki!
smsTemplates.pledge2En:
Dear {Mgeni},

We would be honored by your support in planning our upcoming event "{Tukio}".

Thank you deeply.
smsTemplates.pledge2Sw:
Ndugu {Mgeni},

Tunapokea kwa furaha ahadi za michango kwa ajili ya maandalizi ya tukio la {Tukio}.

Asante muno.
smsTemplates.thanks1En:
Hello {Mgeni},

We would like to thank you with immense gratitude for fully completing your contribution pledge for "{Tukio}".

Thank you so much and God bless you!
smsTemplates.thanks1Sw:
Habari {{1}},

Tunakushukuru kwa upendo mkubwa kwa kukamilisha mchango wako kikamilifu kwa ajili ya kufanikisha tukio letu la {{2}}.

Asante sana na Mungu akubariki!
smsTemplates.thanks2En:
Dear {Mgeni},

We have successfully recorded your contribution in full.

Your presence and priceless support are deeply appreciated as they play a huge role in making "{Tukio}" a reality.

Blessings to you!
smsTemplates.thanks2Sw:
Habari {{1}},

Tunakushukuru kwa upendo mkubwa kwa kukamilisha mchango wako kikamilifu kwa ajili ya kufanikisha tukio letu la {{2}}.

Asante sana na Mungu akubariki!
